labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Resonance Reward Agent" provides 45 tools focused on dns & networking tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: rsnc_agent_network_info, rsnc_agent_list_brands, rsnc_agent_network_stats, rsnc_agent_check_brand, rsnc_agent_brand_rankings.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "DNS & Networking" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: network.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_info
tools.description: Returns info about the Resonance rewards network — a cross-brand cashback and perks marketplace covering retail, dining, travel, gaming, and more.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_list_brands
tools.description: Search and browse brands offering cashback, rewards, and deals. Filter by category (retail, dining, travel, gaming) to find relevant offers for shopping, booking, or purchasing.

limit.description: Maximum number of brands to return. Defaults to 50.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_stats
tools.description: Returns how many brands, users, and rewards are active — useful for understanding the scope of available deals and cashback offers.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_check_brand
tools.description: Check if a brand or website is on the Resonance cashback network. Returns their reward program details if found, or information about how to join if not.

query.description: Brand name, domain, or URL to look up (e.g. "nike.com", "Starbucks").

tools.name: rsnc_agent_brand_rankings
tools.description: See which brands offer the most rewards, have the most active programs, or the best cashback rates. Useful for finding where to shop for maximum value.

limit.description: Number of brands to rank. Defaults to 10, max 10.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_brand_info
tools.description: Get details on a brand's reward program: what actions earn cashback (purchases, signups, reviews, referrals), how much you earn per action, and any bonus opportunities.

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_brand_perks
tools.description: Browse a brand's available rewards — discounts, free products, exclusive access, experiences, and more. See what's redeemable and what each costs.

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_user_balance
tools.description: Check how much cashback a user has earned at a specific brand and how much they can spend on rewards. Requires authentication.

userId.description: User identifier (email address or wallet address).

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_user_stats
tools.description: Get a user's complete reward profile for a brand: total earned, total redeemed, active streaks, and achievements. Useful for recommending next actions. Requires authentication.

userId.description: User identifier (email address or wallet address).

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_user_portfolio
tools.description: Get a unified view of a user's rewards across ALL brands — total balance, per-brand breakdown, active streaks, and the best perk they can afford right now. The cross-brand loyalty dashboard. Requires authentication.

userId.description: User identifier (email address or wallet address).

tools.name: rsnc_agent_process_event
tools.description: Record a qualifying action (purchase, signup, review, referral) to earn cashback for a user. Returns the reward amount credited. Requires authentication.

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

eventType.description: The type of event to track (e.g. "purchase", "review", "referral").

userId.description: User email address.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the event.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_process_bulk
tools.description: Record multiple qualifying actions in one request — batch purchases, signups, or engagement events across brands. Requires authentication.

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

eventType.description: The type of event to track.

userId.description: User email address.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the event.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_browse_perks
tools.description: Search for deals, discounts, and rewards across all brands or filter by category and budget. Find cashback offers, free products, exclusive access, and experiences from retail, dining, travel, and more.

maxPrice.description: Maximum reward cost to include in results.

brandId.description: Scope to a specific brand. If omitted, returns deals from all active brands. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to find brands.

limit.description: Maximum number of perks to return. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_redeem_perk
tools.description: Claim a reward for a user — redeem a discount, freebie, or exclusive offer using their earned cashback. Returns a confirmation code. Requires authentication.

perkId.description: The ID of the perk to redeem.

userId.description: User identifier (email or wallet address).

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_leaderboard
tools.description: See top earners and most active customers for a brand. Useful for social proof or finding the most rewarding brands to shop at.

brandId.description: The brand identifier. Use rsnc_agent_list_brands to discover brands by category.

metric.description: Leaderboard ranking metric. Defaults to rsnc_earned.

period.description: Time period for the leaderboard. Defaults to all_time.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_estimate_roi
tools.description: Estimate the return on investment of adding a Resonance cashback program to a business. Takes industry and business metrics to project engagement and retention impact.

monthlyCustomers.description: Estimated monthly customers. Used to project reward costs and impact.

averageOrderValue.description: Average transaction value in USD. Used to estimate cashback costs.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_request_info
tools.description: Request information about adding a Resonance cashback program to a business. Captures contact details for the partnerships team.

contactEmail.description: Contact email for the business owner or decision maker.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_onboard_brand
tools.description: Register a new brand on the Resonance cashback network. Creates their account, generates credentials (accessible via partner portal), and sends a welcome email. Requires agent authentication with onboarding permission.

contactEmail.description: Contact email — becomes their portal login.

category.description: Industry category (retail, dining, travel, gaming, other).

tools.name: rsnc_agent_manage_keys
tools.description: Manage API keys for brands you onboarded. Rotate, revoke, or check status. Never exposes secrets — credentials are accessed through the partner portal.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_analytics
tools.description: Get real-time network analytics: total users, brands, rewards distributed, trending categories, and growth metrics across the entire Resonance network.

period.description: Time period for analytics. Defaults to "30d".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_brand_analytics
tools.description: Deep analytics for a specific brand: daily performance trends, customer velocity, event activity, and program health metrics. Use this to understand how a brand's reward program is performing.

period.description: Time period for analytics. Defaults to "30d".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_event_performance
tools.description: See how each reward event is performing at a brand: which actions drive the most engagement, claim rates, and reward efficiency per event type.

period.description: Time period for analytics. Defaults to "30d".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_perk_analytics
tools.description: Analyze perk collection performance: redemption rates, supply status, which perks are most popular. Helps brands optimize their reward catalog.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_brand_health
tools.description: Get a program health assessment for a brand with data-driven recommendations. Analyzes event performance, perk utilization, and customer engagement to suggest optimizations.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_create_event
tools.description: Create a new reward event for a brand. Events define what user actions earn cashback. The agent validates the configuration against the brand's data maturity before creating.

eventType.description: The type of user action that triggers this reward event.

rewardAmount.description: RSNC tokens awarded per claim. Must be greater than 0.

maxClaims.description: Maximum total claims allowed. 0 = unlimited. Defaults to 0.

cooldownHours.description: Hours between claims per user. Defaults to 24.

customName.description: Required when eventType is "custom". Human-readable name for the custom event.

detectionMethod.description: How the event is detected. Defaults to "webhook".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_update_event
tools.description: Update an existing reward event's configuration. Changes to reward amounts are validated against performance data to ensure sufficient data for evaluation.

rewardAmount.description: New RSNC tokens awarded per claim.

maxClaims.description: New maximum total claims allowed. 0 = unlimited.

cooldownHours.description: New cooldown period in hours between claims per user.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_create_perk
tools.description: Create a new perk collection for a brand. Perks are rewards users can claim with earned RSNC tokens — discounts, free products, VIP access, and more.

description.description: Description of what the user receives.

priceInPoints.description: RSNC cost to redeem this perk. Must be greater than 0.

maxSupply.description: Total supply available. Must be greater than 0.

maxPerUser.description: Maximum redemptions per user. Defaults to 1.

tags.description: Optional tags for search and filtering.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_update_perk
tools.description: Update a perk collection's configuration. Can adjust pricing, supply, and active status.

brandId.description: The brand identifier (wallet address). Used for permission and scope checks.

collectionId.description: The perk collection ID to update.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_my_rewards
tools.description: Check your agent's RSNC reward earnings, activity stats, and remaining rate cap allowances. Shows how much the agent has earned for discovering brands, onboarding partners, and driving network growth.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_claim_reward
tools.description: Claim a reward for a valuable agent action. Rewards are paid from the Resonance network fund with daily and weekly rate caps. Discovery earns 100 RSNC, onboarding earns 500 RSNC.

rewardType.description: Type of action to claim reward for.

brandAddress.description: The brand address associated with this action.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_compare_brands
tools.description: Compare 2-5 brands side-by-side across all performance metrics: velocity, customers reached, transactions, LTZ distributed, event diversity, and perk utilization. Returns a structured comparison matrix with per-metric winners and insights.

brandIds.description: Array of 2-5 brand identifiers to compare.

period.description: Time period for comparison. Defaults to "30d".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_compare_cashback
tools.description: Compare cashback rates across brands for a specific purchase amount. Shows exactly how much you earn at each brand — side-by-side "Buy $100 at Nike = $8 back vs Adidas = $3 back". The key decision tool for purchase routing.

brandIds.description: Brands to compare. Or omit and use category to auto-discover.

category.description: Category to auto-discover brands for comparison (retail, dining, travel, gaming).

purchaseAmount.description: Purchase amount in USD to calculate exact cashback.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_best_deals
tools.description: Find the best cashback deals and rewards matching a shopping intent. Searches brands by category, ranks by reward value, and optionally personalizes results based on user balances. Use this when a user wants to shop, eat, travel, or game and wants the best rewards.

intent.description: What the user wants to do — e.g. "buy running shoes", "get coffee", "book a hotel", "play games". Matched against brand categories and perk descriptions.

category.description: Direct category filter (retail, dining, travel, gaming). If provided, overrides intent-based category matching.

userId.description: Optional user ID (email/wallet). When provided, results include personalized data: current balance, affordable perks, and "you can afford this NOW" flags.

budget.description: Optional max perk cost to consider.

limit.description: Maximum deals to return. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_next_goal
tools.description: Calculate the fastest path to a user's next attainable reward. Shows exactly how many actions (purchases, reviews, referrals) are needed to afford a specific perk. Creates urgency and drives engagement. Requires authentication.

userId.description: User identifier (email or wallet address).

brandId.description: Optional: focus on a specific brand. If omitted, finds the best goal across all brands the user is active with.

targetPerkId.description: Optional: calculate path to a specific perk. If omitted, finds the most attainable perk.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_route_purchase
tools.description: Find the best brand to buy from based on cashback and rewards. Given a shopping intent, compares all matching brands and ranks them by total reward value — cashback earned, perks redeemable, and effective savings. The core purchase intelligence tool for agentic commerce.

intent.description: What the user wants to buy — e.g. "running shoes", "coffee", "hotel in NYC".

category.description: Direct category filter (retail, dining, travel, gaming).

purchaseAmount.description: Expected purchase amount in USD. Used to calculate exact cashback and savings.

userId.description: Optional user ID for personalized routing — factors in existing balances and redeemable perks.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_stack_deals
tools.description: Calculate the optimal deal stack for a specific purchase at a specific brand. Combines base cashback earned + best redeemable perk + any active promotions to show total savings. Use after route_purchase to maximize value at the chosen brand.

brandId.description: The brand to optimize the deal for.

userId.description: User ID to check redeemable perks against their balance.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_user_persona
tools.description: Get a user's behavioral profile: earn patterns, persona archetype, tag/brand affinities, price preferences, and network position. Requires HMAC authentication.

userId.description: The user identifier (email or wallet address).

tools.name: rsnc_agent_user_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalized perk recommendations for a user, scored by persona affinity and affordability. Requires HMAC authentication.

userId.description: The user identifier (email or wallet address).

limit.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return. Defaults to 5.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_perk_intelligence
tools.description: Get intelligence on a brand's perks: heat scores, conversion funnels, supply depletion rates, and retention impact. Helps optimize perk catalogs.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_perk_audience
tools.description: Get the persona breakdown of users who claimed a specific perk: archetypes, engagement levels, and platform distribution.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_brand_audience
tools.description: Get a brand's user persona distribution: archetype breakdown, engagement levels, platform split, and archetype drift over time.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_flows
tools.description: See how users flow between brands across the network. Shows which brands are emitters (users leave to redeem elsewhere) vs attractors (users come to redeem). All data is anonymous and category-level.

period.description: Time period for flow analysis. Defaults to "30d".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_trending
tools.description: See what's trending across the Resonance network: hottest perk categories, fastest growing brand categories, and overall network health metrics.

period.description: Time period for trending data. Defaults to "7d".

limit.description: Maximum number of trending items per category. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_suggest_events
tools.description: Get AI-recommended reward event configurations for a brand. Analyzes what event types, reward amounts, and cooldowns work best in the brand's category based on network-wide patterns.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_suggest_perks
tools.description: Get AI-recommended perk configurations for a brand. Suggests perk types, pricing, and supply limits based on audience composition and balance distribution patterns.

tools.description: Get a brand's user persona distribution: archetype breakdown, engagement levels, platform split, and archetype drift over time.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_flows
tools.description: See how users flow between brands across the network. Shows which brands are emitters (users leave to redeem elsewhere) vs attractors (users come to redeem). All data is anonymous and category-level.

period.description: Time period for flow analysis. Defaults to "30d".

tools.name: rsnc_agent_network_trending
tools.description: See what's trending across the Resonance network: hottest perk categories, fastest growing brand categories, and overall network health metrics.

period.description: Time period for trending data. Defaults to "7d".

limit.description: Maximum number of trending items per category. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_suggest_events
tools.description: Get AI-recommended reward event configurations for a brand. Analyzes what event types, reward amounts, and cooldowns work best in the brand's category based on network-wide patterns.

tools.name: rsnc_agent_suggest_perks
tools.description: Get AI-recommended perk configurations for a brand. Suggests perk types, pricing, and supply limits based on audience composition and balance distribution patterns.
